name: Sailboxes
summary: Persistent Linux VMs built for long-horizon AI agents. A Sailbox checkpoints its full memory state when idle, wakes on inbound traffic, and bills only the CPU, RAM, and disk it actually uses while running.
pricing_model: Usage-based: billed on actively used vCPU, RAM, and disk, plus a one-time creation fee
notes: Seed entry from the provider's public docs. The first bootstrap run replaces it with fresh cited research.
